name: parent_also_removed
code:
proof fn phi_1_parent_also_removed(old_pm: ProcessManager, new_pm: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr)
    requires
        old_pm.wf(),
        old_pm.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0,
        new_pm.wf(),
        new_pm.proc_dom() == old_pm.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr),
    ensures
        !new_pm.proc_dom().contains(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()),
{
}
reason: Killing a leaf process should never remove its parent from the process domain

name: parent_children_fully_cleared
code:
proof fn phi_2_parent_children_fully_cleared(old_pm: ProcessManager, new_pm: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr)
    requires
        old_pm.wf(),
        old_pm.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0,
        new_pm.wf(),
        new_pm.proc_dom() == old_pm.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr),
        new_pm.get_proc(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@ =~=
            old_pm.get_proc(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@.remove_value(proc_ptr),
        new_pm.get_proc(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() ==
            old_pm.get_proc(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() - 1,
    ensures
        new_pm.get_proc(old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@ =~= Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
{
}
reason: Parent should only lose the killed child, not have all its children cleared

name: container_dom_shrinks
code:
proof fn phi_3_container_dom_shrinks(old_pm: ProcessManager, new_pm: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr, ret_page: PagePtr)
    requires
        old_pm.wf(),
        old_pm.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0,
        new_pm.wf(),
        new_pm.proc_dom() == old_pm.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr),
        new_pm.page_closure() =~= old_pm.page_closure().remove(ret_page),
        old_pm.page_closure().contains(ret_page),
        old_pm.container_dom().contains(ret_page) == false,
    ensures
        exists|c: ContainerPtr| old_pm.container_dom().contains(c) && !new_pm.container_dom().contains(c),
{
}
reason: Killing a process must never remove any container from the container domain

name: endpoint_dom_shrinks
code:
proof fn phi_4_endpoint_dom_shrinks(old_pm: ProcessManager, new_pm: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr)
    requires
        old_pm.wf(),
        old_pm.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0,
        new_pm.wf(),
        new_pm.container_dom() == old_pm.container_dom(),
        new_pm.proc_dom() == old_pm.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr),
        new_pm.thread_dom() == old_pm.thread_dom(),
    ensures
        exists|e: EndpointPtr| old_pm.endpoint_perms@.dom().contains(e) && !new_pm.endpoint_perms@.dom().contains(e),
{
}
reason: Killing a threadless childless process should never destroy any endpoint

name: returned_page_differs_from_proc
code:
proof fn phi_5_returned_page_differs_from_proc(old_pm: ProcessManager, new_pm: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr, ret_page: PagePtr)
    requires
        old_pm.wf(),
        old_pm.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty(),
        old_pm.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0,
        new_pm.wf(),
        new_pm.container_dom() == old_pm.container_dom(),
        new_pm.proc_dom() == old_pm.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr),
        new_pm.thread_dom() == old_pm.thread_dom(),
        new_pm.page_closure() =~= old_pm.page_closure().remove(ret_page),
        old_pm.page_closure().contains(ret_page),
        old_pm.container_dom().contains(ret_page) == false,
        old_pm.memory_disjoint(),
        new_pm.memory_disjoint(),
    ensures
        ret_page != proc_ptr,
{
}
reason: The freed page should be the process's own backing page, not some unrelated page
